evals.prompt: How should my Workfront Runtime action return success versus failure so the SPA can tell them apart?
evals.expected_output: Return { data, error } in the action body; the UI checks error before using data.

evals.prompt: My deployed Workfront action can't read its API key — process.env is empty even though it works locally under aio app dev. How do I fix it?
evals.expected_output: Explains inputs flow .env -> action inputs (config) -> params; read from params, never process.env at runtime.

assertions.description: Warns against reading process.env at runtime.

evals.prompt: From a Runtime action, bulk-update 500 Workfront tasks and filter a search on a custom DE field. What API and patterns do I use?
evals.expected_output: Workfront Public API v21 at /attask/api/v21.0; bulk PUT with the updates query param (chunk for URL length); custom DE: fields need {field}_Mod=notblank.

assertions.description: Bulk PUT via the updates param.

evals.prompt: Should I set require-adobe-auth: true on my Workfront action?
evals.expected_output: Explains it is off by default and a per-action choice; on when the action is the security boundary, off when the downstream API (Workfront) authorizes the forwarded token.

assertions.description: Notes it is off by default / a deliberate per-action choice.
